$10,000,000 Bitcoin Price Coming Amid US Dollar Collapse, Says Fund Manager Larry Lepard – Here’s His Outlook
articles.description: The founder of a Boston-based investment management firm says the US dollar is heading toward total collapse – an event that will fuel a massive rise in the price of Bitcoin. Larry Lepard, founder and managing partner at Equity Management Associates, says it’s now obvious that the dollar will continue its decades-long spiral of depreciation, […] The post $10,000,000 Bitcoin Price Coming Amid US Dollar Collapse, Says Fund Manager Larry Lepard – Here’s His Outlook appeared first on The Daily Hodl.
